hero.title: Enlyten2 Laser Center
hero.subtitle: State-of-the-art laser and aesthetic treatments in the heart of Madaba, Jordan — where science meets beauty.

philosophy.label: Our Philosophy
philosophy.title: The Science of Luminous Beauty
philosophy.content: At Enlyten2, we believe skin is the canvas of your confidence. Our philosophy merges state-of-the-art laser technology with a boutique approach to skincare. We don't just treat; we curate.

precision.title: Precision Tech
precision.text: Industry-leading laser systems for unmatched accuracy and safety.

artisan.title: Artisan Care
artisan.text: Personalized protocols designed for your unique skin blueprint.

treatments.title: Curated Treatments
treatments.subtitle: Advanced aesthetic solutions tailored to your luminous goals.

profile.title: Your Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your personal details and history.

experience.title: The Enlyten2
experience.subtitle: We believe skin health is a clinical art. Our sanctuary combines world-leading laser technology with an editorial eye for natural, high-performance results.
experience.step1Text: A deep clinical analysis of your skin's unique blueprint using high-resolution skin mapping technology.
experience.step2Text: A bespoke protocol curated by our clinicians, selecting from the world's most advanced laser platforms.
experience.step3Text: Revealing your most luminous skin yet through precise, high-trust clinical execution.
experience.philosophyText: Every treatment at Enlyten2 is a signature experience. We don't just treat skin; we refine it with the precision of a laser and the soul of a gallery.
